title: selenicereus paradisiacus
intro: Selenicereus paradisiacus, commonly known as the Queen of the Night or Night-Blooming Cereus, is a species of cactus native to Central and South America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Selenicereus paradisiacus include reducing inflammation, fighting off bacterial infections, and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, the herbal preparation of this plant is made by drying and crushing the stems, which can then be used in teas, tinctures, or topical applications.
